title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #10, Franky, Unknown person #11, Dorry, Nami as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Wow!!; the lady giant!!>

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess it doesn't matter if we overdid it now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nik. I'm not sure if I can't.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heeey, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: They brought the sunny, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Greetings, straw hat crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name is GORD, and this is golden.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're Hajrudin's Subordinates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry you had to see our ugly side just now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll guide you properly from here on out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OHH!! GORD-CHAN WILL BE MY GUIDING STAR!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea what we just went through!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll make it up to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go, usopp!! Their village is on this level!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wooooo!! I'm so ready for this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just head straight out of the forest from here and you'll see some clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a ride on them and you'll be at the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We'll be right behind you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wow!! Island clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You sure? If you're wrong, we'll fall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She said we could ride 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: On the giant warrior pirates' ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You'll be able to see it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As soon as we clear these clouds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf has three levels. Going from top to bottom you have:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Heaven

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the realms of heaven, the sun, and the dead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We live where it shines, the realm of the sun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: On that floor there are many villages.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so vast, the landscape stretches out as far as the eye can see!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And that's our village there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: wow!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Welcome to Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It is a sight of such enormity that it stuns all visitors."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Whooooa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You guys!! Someday, I swear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Most fail to find words that adequately describe its immense grandeur."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: to the village of Warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm going to Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All right, usop! Let's do it!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
